content.text: The system shall allow users to navigate to the Dashboard via the path Rack → IRDS → Dashboard.
the user is on the application
the user navigates via Rack → IRDS → Dashboard
the system shall display the Dashboard screen.
The system shall display the page title “Dashboard” at the top of the screen.
I know which page I am on
The system shall display breadcrumb navigation reflecting the current path.
The system shall display breadcrumb navigation showing Rack > IRDS > Dashboard.
the system shall display Rack > IRDS > Dashboard.
The system shall highlight the currently active menu item.
the system shall highlight the active menu item.
The system shall provide a toggle to switch between With Data and No Data views.
the user switches between With Data and No Data
the system shall update the dashboard view accordingly.
The system shall provide a time filter dropdown (e.g., Yearly, Last 30 days, 3 months, 6 months).
the system shall display time filter dropdown.
The system shall provide a Year selector dropdown (e.g., 2026).
the system shall display Year selector dropdown.
The system shall update all dashboard data based on selected filters.
the system shall update all dashboard data.
The system shall display a KPI section on the dashboard consisting of multiple KPI cards.
the system shall display KPI section.
The system shall display each KPI card with a title, metric value, and supporting label/description.
each card shall display title, value, and description.

12.title: Dynamic KPI Values Based on Filters

content.text: The system shall display KPI values dynamically based on selected filters (time/year/view).
KPI values to update based on selected filters
I can view accurate and relevant performance metrics
the user updates one or more filters (time range, year, or data view)
the system shall dynamically update all KPI values based on the selected filters without requiring a page reload.
The system shall display KPI Card titled “Rach Health Score with the subtitle “Rack Health Analytics” below the title.
the system shall display “Rack Health Score” with subtitle “Rack Health Analytics”.
The system shall display Rack Health Score as a percentage value. (e.g. 72%)
see Rack Health Score as a percentage
I can understand overall rack condition
the user views the Rack Health Score card
the system shall display the score as a percentage value (e.g., 72%).
The system shall display a KPI card titled “Rack Stability”, with the subtitle “Stability · Rack Health Analytics”.
the system shall display a card titled “Rack Stability” with subtitle “Stability · Rack Health Analytics”.
The system shall display the number of stable racks out of the total racks (e.g., 23 Stable out of 32 total racks).
the Rack Stability card is displayed
the system shall display stable racks out of total racks.
The system shall display the stable rack count ratio in the format “stable racks / total racks.”
the Rack Stability card is displayed
the system shall display stable racks / total racks format.
The system shall highlight unstable rack count (e.g., 9 Unstable) using visual indicators.
the system shall highlight unstable rack count using visual indicators.
The system shall display a KPI card titled “Open Actions” with the subtitle “Call To Action + Maintenance”
the system shall display “Open Actions” with subtitle “Call To Action + Maintenance”.
The system shall display the total number of open corrective or maintenance actions.
the Open Actions card is displayed
the system shall display total number of open actions.
The system shall display the number of overdue actions within the KPI card.
the system shall display overdue actions count.

22.title: Display Pallet / Level Blocked KPI Card

content.text: The system shall display a KPI card titled “Pallet / Level Blocked”.
a KPI card titled “Pallet / Level Blocked” displayed
I can monitor blocked pallet or level locations.
the system displays a KPI card titled “Pallet / Level Blocked”.
The system shall display supporting text below the KPI title indicating the context as “Total blocked · Unload progress”.
supporting context text displayed below the KPI title
the system displays the text “Total blocked · Unload progress” below the KPI title.
The system shall display the blocked unload progress metric in the format “ / ” within the KPI card.
the unload progress metric displayed in the KPI card
I can track blocked unload completion.
the system displays the blocked unload progress metric in the format “X / Y”.
The system shall display a tooltip on hover over the KPI value “12 of 45 blocked locations unloaded”
a tooltip displayed on hover over the KPI value
I can view detailed blocked unload information.
the user hovers over the KPI value
the system displays the tooltip: “12 of 45 blocked locations unloaded”
The system shall display a restriction badge showing the restricted count in the format “+ Restricted”.
a restriction badge displayed with the restricted count
I can identify restricted locations quickly.
the system displays a restriction badge in the format “+ 8 Restricted”.
The system shall display a tooltip on hover over the Restricted badge “8 Locations are restricted and require review”
a tooltip displayed on hover over the Restricted badge
I can understand the restriction details.
the user hovers over the badge
the system displays the tooltip: “8 Locations are restricted and require review”
The system shall visually highlight the restriction badge using warning or restricted-state styling.
the system applies warning or restricted-state styling to the badge.
The system shall dynamically update the unload progress count and restricted count based on the latest operational data.
unload progress and restricted counts updated dynamically
I always see the latest operational data.
the system updates the unload progress count and restricted count dynamically based on the latest data.
The system shall display a KPI card titled “All Events”, with the subtitle “Completed vs Total Events”.
the system shall display “All Events” with subtitle “Completed vs Total Events”.
The system shall display the number of completed inspections and total inspections in the format “Completed / Total” (e.g., 18/30).
the number of completed and total inspections displayed
the KPI or inspection card is displayed
the system displays the inspection count in the format “Completed / Total” (e.g., 18/30).
The system shall display a status badge indicating the number of overdue events (e.g., “3 Overdue”).
a status badge showing overdue events
I can quickly identify pending overdue inspections or actions.
the KPI or inspection card is displayed
the system displays a status badge showing the overdue count (e.g., “3 Overdue”).

33.title: View Available Material Stock KPI Card

content.text: The system shall display a card titled “Available Material Stock.”
the system shall display “Available Material Stock”.
The system shall display the subtitle “Stock · Procurement” below the card title.
the system shall display subtitle “Stock · Procurement”.
The system shall display the available material quantity against the total required materials in the format “Available / Required” (e.g., 90/120).
the system shall display Available / Required format (e.g. 90/120)
The system shall calculate the material shortage as the difference between required materials and available materials.
the system shall calculate shortage as the difference between required materials available materials.
The system shall display a shortage indicator badge showing the number of materials currently unavailable (e.g., “Shortage 30”).
I can quickly identify unavailable materials.
the inventory or materials KPI card is displayed
the system displays a shortage badge showing unavailable material count (e.g., “Shortage 30”).

38.title: Dynamically Update Materials and Shortage Data

content.text: The system shall dynamically update the available materials count and shortage value when inventory or procurement data changes.
available material counts and shortage values updated dynamically
I always see the latest inventory and procurement status.
the dashboard refreshes or receives updated data
the system updates the available materials count and shortage value dynamically
The system shall display a section titled “Observation Lifecycle.”
the system shall display a section titled “Observation Lifecycle”.
The system shall display a card showing the total number of Observations Found.
the Observation Lifecycle section is displayed
the system shall display a card showing total no. of Observations Found.
The system shall display the total count of observations identified during inspections.
I know how many issues exist
the system shall display total number of observations.
The system shall display the number of critical observations below the observations count.
the system shall display the number of critical observations below the observations count.
The system shall display a card titled “Actions” indicating the number of actions created from observations.
the Observation Lifecycle section is displayed
the system shall display a card titled “Actions”.
The system shall display the actions created count in the format “Actions Created / Total Observations.”
the system shall display Actions Created / Total Observations.
The system shall display a visual progress indicator representing the ratio of actions created against observations.
the system shall display a progress indicator representing actions created against observations.
The system shall display a card titled “Pending Actions” showing the number of actions awaiting completion.
the Observation Lifecycle section is displayed
the system shall display a card titled “Pending Actions” showing the number of actions awaiting completion.
The system shall display the pending actions count in the format “Pending Actions / Total Actions.”
the system shall display Pending Actions / Total Actions.
The system shall display a status indicator labeled “Awaiting completion” for pending actions.
the system shall display status “Awaiting completion”.
The system shall display a card titled “Closed” indicating the number of completed actions.
the Observation Lifecycle section is displayed
the system shall display a card titled “Closed”.
The system shall display the completed actions count in the format “Closed Actions / Total Actions.”
the system shall display Closed Actions / Total Actions.
The system shall display a visual progress indicator representing completed actions.
the system shall display a progress indicator for completed actions.
The system shall display a chart titled “Issue Findings.”
the system shall display a chart titled “Issue Findings”.
The system shall display the subtitle “Monthly · by severity.”
the system shall display subtitle “Monthly · by severity”.
The system shall display monthly findings trends categorized by severity levels: Green, Amber, and Red.
the system shall display trends categorized as Green, Amber, and Red.
The system shall display the trend using a multi-line chart representing each severity category.
the system shall display a multi-line chart.
The system shall display distinct colors for severity categories (Green, Amber, Red).
the system shall display distinct colours for Green, Amber, and Red.
The system shall display months of the year on the X-axis of the chart.
the system shall display months of the year.
The system shall display number of findings on the Y-axis of the chart.
see number of findings on the Y-axis
I can understand the scale of data
the Issue Findings chart is displayed
the system shall display number of findings on the Y-axis.
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over a data point, showing severity counts and total findings for the selected month.
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall display a tooltip showing severity-wise counts and total findings for the selected month.
The system shall display the total number of findings below the chart.
the user views below the chart
the system shall display total number of findings.
The system shall display the breakdown of total findings by severity (critical, medium, low).
the system shall display counts for critical, medium, and low findings.
The system shall display a Critical Observation Log section containing rack-, frame-, and element-level critical observations.
a Critical Observation Log section displayed
I can review rack-, frame-, and element-level critical observations.
the dashboard or observation screen is displayed
the system displays a Critical Observation Log section containing rack-, frame-, and element-level observations.
The system shall display the total number of critical observations in a summary badge at the top of the section.
the total number of critical observations displayed
I can quickly assess the number of issues.
the Critical Observation Log section is displayed
the system displays the total observation count in a summary badge at the top of the section.
The system shall display download icon at the top of the section
see a download icon in the section header
I can access data export functionality easily
the user views the top area of the section
the system shall display a download icon at the top of the section
The system shall allow the user to download file in CSV format on clicking the download icon from the top of the section.
download section data in CSV format
I can use the data outside the application
the user clicks the download icon
the system shall generate and download the file in CSV format
The system shall dynamically update the critical observation count based on the available observation records.
the displayed count always reflects current records.
observation records are added, updated, or removed
the system updates the critical observation count dynamically.
The system shall display observation records as individual cards within the Critical Observation Log section.
I can review observations in a structured format.
the Critical Observation Log section is displayed
the system displays observation records as individual cards.
The system shall display the Observation Pin identifier for each observation card.
the Observation Pin identifier displayed on each card
the system displays the Observation Pin identifier.
The system shall display the associated Rack, Bay, Level, and Element Type information for each observation card.
Rack, Bay, Level, and Element Type information displayed
I can identify the observation location accurately.
the system displays Rack, Bay, Level, and Element Type information.
The system shall visually separate location attributes such as Rack, Bay, Level, and Element Type using delimiters or spacing.
the information is easy to read.
the system separates Rack, Bay, Level, and Element Type using delimiters or spacing.
The system shall display the observation description under the Observation label for each observation card.
the observation description displayed under the Observation label
I can understand the issue details.
the system displays the observation description under the Observation label.
The system shall display a severity badge for each observation card.
a severity badge displayed for each observation
I can identify issue severity quickly.
the system displays a severity badge for the observation.
The system shall visually differentiate observation severities using color-coded badges such as Red and Green.
I can visually distinguish severity levels.
the system uses color-coded badges such as Red and Green for severity indication.

74.title: Display Red Badge for Critical Severity

content.text: The system shall display the Red severity badge for observations marked as critical or severe.
critical observations highlighted with a red badge
an observation is marked as critical or severe
the system displays a Red severity badge.

75.title: Display Green Badge for Low Severity

content.text: The system shall display the Green severity badge for observations marked as normal or low severity.
low-severity observations highlighted with a green badge
an observation is marked as normal or low severity
the system displays a Green severity badge.
The system shall support scrolling within the Critical Observation Log section when the number of observation cards exceeds the visible area.
scrolling supported within the Critical Observation Log
I can access all observation cards.
the number of observation cards exceeds the visible area
the Critical Observation Log section is displayed
the system supports scrolling within the section.
The system shall maintain a consistent card layout for all observation entries.
the observation list remains visually organized.
the system maintains a consistent card layout for all entries.
The system shall display location information with an associated location icon for visual identification.
location information displayed with an associated icon
the system displays a location icon alongside the location information.
The system shall display the most recent or prioritized observations within the visible list according to system-defined sorting logic.
the most recent or prioritized observations displayed first
I can focus on the most important issues.
the Critical Observation Log section is displayed
the system displays observations according to system-defined sorting logic.

80.title: Navigate to Call to Action Screen

content.text: The system shall navigate user to “Call to Action” main screen when the user clicks on observation card.
navigate to the Call to Action screen when selecting an observation
I can review and act on the issue details.
the user clicks the observation card
the system navigates the user to the Call to Action main screen.
The system shall display a section titled “Integrity Tests.”
the system shall display “Integrity Tests” section.
The system shall display the total number of integrity tests assigned.
the system shall display total assigned integrity tests.
The system shall display the number of completed integrity tests.
the system shall display completed integrity tests.
The system shall display the number of acceptable integrity test results.
the system shall display acceptable test results count.
The system shall display the number of not acceptable integrity test results.
the system shall display not acceptable test results count.
The system shall display a summary statement indicating the count of acceptable and not acceptable tests.
the system shall display a summary showing acceptable and not acceptable counts.
The system shall display a section titled “Findings Trend.”
the system shall display “Findings Trend” section.
The system shall display the subtitle “Findings by severity.”
the system shall display subtitle “Findings by severity”.
The system shall display tabs for filtering findings trends by category (Inspection, TPI, Integrity).
the system shall display tabs for Inspection, TPI, and Integrity.
The system shall display the Inspection tab as selected by default.
the system shall select Inspection tab by default.
The system shall update the findings trend data when the user switches between Inspection, TPI, and Integrity tabs.
the system shall update findings trend data accordingly.
The system shall display a card showing the number of observations found for the selected category.
the system shall display number of observations found
The system shall display a card showing the number of critical findings for the selected category.
the system shall display critical findings count for selected category.
The system shall display a severity distribution legend indicating counts for Red, Amber, and green findings.
the system shall display counts for Red, Amber, and Green findings.
The system shall display a section titled “Resource Layer – BOQ · Stock · Maintenance · Reports.”
the system shall display “Resource Layer – BOQ · Stock · Maintenance · Reports”.
The system shall display a card titled “Stock Coverage.” with the subtitle – Availability of required materials.
the system shall display “Stock Coverage” with subtitle “Availability of required materials”.
The system shall display the total number of required materials.
the system shall display total number of required materials.
The system shall display the total number of available materials in stock.
the user views the Stock Coverage card
the system shall display the total number of available materials.
The system shall calculate and display the material shortage as the difference between required and available materials.
required and available material data exist
the system shall calculate and display the shortage as required minus available.
The system shall display a readiness percentage based on available materials against required materials.
required and available material data exist
the user views the Stock Coverage card
the system shall display readiness percentage based on available vs required materials.
The system shall display a progress bar representing the stock readiness percentage.
the system shall display a progress bar representing the readiness percentage.
The system shall display a warning message indicating the percentage of missing required materials when shortages exist.
the user views the Stock Coverage card
the system shall display a warning message indicating percentage of missing materials.
The system shall display a card titled “Stock Alerts.”
the system shall display a card titled “Stock Alerts”.
The system shall display subtitle indicating the number of OEM suppliers.
the system shall display subtitle indicating number of OEM suppliers.
The system shall display a list of suppliers providing rack materials.
the system shall display list of suppliers.
For each supplier, the system shall display the supplier’s name and identifier.
the system shall display supplier name and identifier.
The system shall display the number of materials available and required for each supplier.
the system shall display available and required material counts per supplier.
The system shall display a shortage indicator for suppliers when required materials exceed available stock.
the system shall display shortage indicator for that supplier.
The system shall display a card titled “Maintenance.”
the system shall display a card titled “Maintenance”.
The system shall categorize maintenance actions by action status.
the system shall categorize actions by status.
The system shall display the number of pending maintenance actions.
the system shall display number of pending actions.

the system shall display number of delayed actions.

the system shall display number of assigned actions.

the system shall display number of closed actions.

the system shall display a card titled “Team Contribution”.

the system shall display subtitle “Inspector-wise inspection breakdown”.
The system shall display a list of inspectors who performed inspections.
the system shall display list of inspectors.
For each inspector, the system shall display the number of assigned inspection tasks.
the system shall display number of assigned inspection tasks
For each inspector, the system shall display the number of completed inspections.
the system shall display number of completed inspections.
For each inspector, the system shall display the number of overdue inspections.
the system shall display number of overdue inspections.
The system shall display a section titled “Open Actions.”
the system shall display a section titled “Open Actions”
The system shall display the subtitle “Call to Action · Priority Order.”
the Open Actions section is displayed
the system shall display subtitle “Call to Action · Priority Order”.
The system shall display a button labeled “View all” that allows the user to navigate to the Maintenance - Pending assignment tab.
the Open Actions section is displayed
the system shall navigate to the Maintenance – Pending Assignment tab.
The system shall display open actions in a tabular format.
see open actions in table format
the system shall display actions in a tabular format.
The system shall display the following columns in the table: Severity, Observation ID, Rack Name, QR, Activity Phase, Observation, Action Assigned, Reported Date, and Reported By.
the system shall display columns: Severity, Observation ID, Rack Name, QR, Activity Phase, Observation, Action Assigned, Reported Date, and Reported By.
The system shall display a severity indicator using color-coded dots representing issue severity.
the system shall display color-coded severity indicators
The system shall display the Observation ID as a clickable reference to the observation record.
the system shall open the corresponding observation record
The system shall display the rack identifier associated with the observation.
the system shall display rack identifier for each observation.
The system shall display the QR or location reference where the issue was identified.
the system shall display QR or location reference.
The system shall display the activity phase during which the observation occurred (e.g., Installation, Design Discrepancy, O&M).
the system shall display activity phase (e.g., Installation, Design Discrepancy, O&M).
The system shall display the description of the observation identified during inspection.
the system shall display observation description.
The system shall display the recommended action assigned for each observation.
the system shall display recommended or assigned action.
The system shall display the date and time when the observation was reported.
the system shall display reported date and time.
The system shall display the inspector who reported the observation.
the system shall display the inspector’s name.
The system shall allow users to select individual rows using checkboxes displayed in the table.
the system shall allow selection of individual rows.
